positive: A mesmerizing, highly detailed celestial floral mandala design. Central composition featuring glowing bioluminescent flora intertwined with stylized cosmic elements like crescent moons, nebula dust, and minimalist constellation lines. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau and modern mystical engraving, executed with clean lines and strong, saturated contrast. Dominant color palette: deep indigo, ethereal gold, teal, and muted lavender. The composition must be centered and designed as a repeating, high-contrast silhouette artwork suitable for apparel printing. Detailed cross-hatching and fine line work must give the illusion of depth while maintaining a flat, print-ready aesthetic. Full view, highly symmetrical, elegant, mystical.
